title: Honor Above Victory
description: On pages 13–15, honor above victory as the giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means.
scene: Honor Above Victory. The giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But above all,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How unfortunate your route pointed out by your log pose is...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The name of the next place on your journey is,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Little Garden."

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even if I weren't to lay a single finger on you,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's more than likely that you'd still never reach Alabasta...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Without even meeting crocodile, the curtains will close on your mission and lives.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As if we'd just roll over and die! Now gimme back my hat!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, how dare you!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Y-You big meanie!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: How old are you? A

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: enough howling, anyone could put up a brave front.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Flick

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yet to know of the difficulty that lies ahead and still rush in is an act fit for only fools.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: An eternal pose!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You'll be able to skip right over your future troubles with that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The needle of that log pose points to an obscure uninhabited island located right before Alabama.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Moreover, the route you'll be navigating on is unknown to baroque works so you won't be followed by anyone either.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What? Is she not a bad person then?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: W-Why would you give such a thing to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...It's probably a trap.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Oh, I wonder about that...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What should I do... I don't want to accept this log pose from her of all people but picking the safest and surest route is crucial...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Enough wasting time with that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you an idiot!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: DOF!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She came out all the way here to teach us the safest route to Alabasta!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: What are you going to do if she does turn out to be a good person!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Don't you dare think,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: that you can choose the path of our journey!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on honor above victory. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
